ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: and (Proposal_Uploaded__c = 0, Probability >= 0.6, ISCHANGED( StageName ), RecordType18ID__c ='012b0000000M3zQAAS', ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Upsell'), Not( ISPICKVAL( Product_Sold__c , 'Annual Price Increase')), NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name, 'Integration')), $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'Channel Sales - BDR' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Either add the proposal document that was sent to the client to the 'Notes and Attachments' of the PROPOSAL section (Not Opportunity N&A) or generate a new one from the Opp. KC Link https://sites.google.com/similarweb.com/sops-kc/proposal?authuser=0
